name: opening-uldah-battle
title: Ul'dah Opening Battle Tutorial
description: Reproduce the Man0u0 opening tutorial through the escaped goobbue battle and return-to-town transition.
steps: Reset the test character to the Ul'dah opening tutorial when a clean run is needed.
Start the bridge with diagnostics enabled and a fresh session.
Log in, select the test character, and proceed through the opening town tutorial.
Enter active mode when the client asks for the battle tutorial.
Target the escaped goobbue and allow autoattack to run.
Record visible client messages such as out-of-range, damage, defeat, item reward, and zone-out.
Capture a bridge snapshot before making code changes.
success_criteria: Active mode is traced as a state change instead of a targetless attack.
The escaped goobbue receives damage and reaches 0 HP.
Quest phase advances to 10 after the battle.
The battle content area finishes and destroys cleanly.
Any owner-missing events after zone-out are classified for follow-up.
